name: HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual preparation causes late filings, leading to compliance penalties. We automate payroll tax filing summaries instead of manual preparation.
target_audience: HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Timely payroll tax filing summaries are often missed, leading to compliance issues.
features: Email summaries to HR ops teams

locked_fields.primary_user: HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Timely payroll tax filing summaries are often missed, leading to compliance issues.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual preparation causes late filings, leading to compliance penalties. We automate payroll tax filing summaries instead of manual preparation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual preparation of payroll tax summaries and email notifications.
must_have_features: Email summaries to HR ops teams

one_liner: For HR operations teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual preparation causes late filings, leading to compliance penalties. We automate payroll tax filing summaries instead of manual preparation.
